channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Is Saudi Arabia Now Quietly Switching Sides In US-Iran War?
item.description: The Saudi presence at the Ayatollah's funeral as well as its refusal to join America's 'Project Freedom' points to a quiet shift away from its ally, the US.
item.content:encoded: The Saudi presence at the Ayatollah's funeral as well as its refusal to join America's 'Project Freedom' points to a quiet shift away from its ally, the US.

item.title: Indian Truck Driver Behind Multi Vehicle Crash In US Gets 5 Years In Prison

media:content.media:description: Singh was sentenced to four years and eight months in prison on Tuesday.

item.description: Singh, who was 21 at the time of the crash, had pleaded guilty to three counts of vehicular manslaughter with gross negligence in June.
item.content:encoded: Singh, who was 21 at the time of the crash, had pleaded guilty to three counts of vehicular manslaughter with gross negligence in June.

item.title: Why Europe's Deadly Heatwave Is More Than Just A Summer Crisis

media:content.media:description: The heatwave has now exposed public infrastructure and its incapacity to deal with the sweltering heat.

item.description: A persisitne high-pressure system, combined with warmer-than-average sea surface temperatures, has trapped an immense mass of hot air over Europe, driving extreme temperatures across the continent.
item.content:encoded: A persisitne high-pressure system, combined with warmer-than-average sea surface temperatures, has trapped an immense mass of hot air over Europe, driving extreme temperatures across the continent.

item.title: Where Is Myanmar's Aung San Suu Kyi? Son Demands Proof Of Life

media:content.media:description: The junta has repeatedly said she is in good health but has not provided any evidence.

item.description: Even Aung San Suu Kyi's lawyers have not been allowed to meet her since she was arrested after Myanmar's military overthrew her elected government in a coup in February 2021.
item.content:encoded: Even Aung San Suu Kyi's lawyers have not been allowed to meet her since she was arrested after Myanmar's military overthrew her elected government in a coup in February 2021.

item.title: How Iran Used Data Roaming, Ad Tech To Track US Military Personnel In Gulf

media:content.media:description: he prospect of enemies stalking US personnel has alarmed American lawmakers

item.description: The malicious cyberattacks came in the build-up to the US-Israeli war against Iran that started late February and continued in the early days of the conflict
item.content:encoded: The malicious cyberattacks came in the build-up to the US-Israeli war against Iran that started late February and continued in the early days of the conflict

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | China Now Has 7 Of The World's 10 Biggest Banks, And That Should Worry India
item.description: Seven of the world's ten largest banks are now headquartered in China. Twenty-two Chinese banks figure in the top 100. No Indian bank comes anywhere close.
item.content:encoded: Seven of the world's ten largest banks are now headquartered in China. Twenty-two Chinese banks figure in the top 100. No Indian bank comes anywhere close.

item.title: "Fastest Implementation": UK Trade Minister On Trade Deal With India

media:content.media:description: India-UK trade deal comes into force with major tariff cuts on whisky and autos.

item.description: Chris Bryant said deal marks quickest turnaround UK has ever managed between signing an agreement and bringing it into effect.
item.content:encoded: Chris Bryant said deal marks quickest turnaround UK has ever managed between signing an agreement and bringing it into effect.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: Iran Threatens To Shut More Energy Corridors After Hormuz Closure
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: A fifth of all traded crude oil and natural gas passed through the Strait of Hormuz before the war, when it was open to all without tolls.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: A fifth of all traded crude oil and natural gas passed through the Strait of Hormuz before the war, when it was open to all without tolls.

item.title: "Ship Has Safely Crossed": Indian Man's Last Text To Family Before Strike Killed Him

media:content.media:description: Heramb Karmarkar's family on Wednesday confirmed he has died.

item.description: Karmarkar, 30, was among the Indian crew members who had gone missing following an attack on the merchant vessel 'GFX Galaxy' near the coast of Oman in the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday.
item.content:encoded: Karmarkar, 30, was among the Indian crew members who had gone missing following an attack on the merchant vessel 'GFX Galaxy' near the coast of Oman in the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday.

item.title: Relief For India, China As US Lowers 500% Russian Oil Tariff Threat To 100%

media:content.media:description: The billsought to impose sanctions on Russian officials

item.description: The updated version also allows an exception for countries that import less than 15 per cent of Russia's natural gas exports and are taking significant steps to reduce those imports, which could exempt Japan, France, Hungary, and Belgium.
item.content:encoded: The updated version also allows an exception for countries that import less than 15 per cent of Russia's natural gas exports and are taking significant steps to reduce those imports, which could exempt Japan, France, Hungary, and Belgium.

item.title: Pete Hegseth Blocks Admiral Promotions, Women Officers Hit Hardest

media:content.media:description: Pete Hegseth has not publicly explained the reason behind the removal of officers from the promotion list

item.description: The officers were part of a list of 22 candidates chosen by a board of senior admirals after reviewing their performance over careers spanning more than 25 years, reported The NY Times.
item.content:encoded: The officers were part of a list of 22 candidates chosen by a board of senior admirals after reviewing their performance over careers spanning more than 25 years, reported The NY Times.

item.title: OpenAI's First Device To Be Movable, Screenless Speaker To Challenge Apple

media:content.media:description: The device represents a critical next step for OpenAI

item.description: OpenAI is developing a movable, screen-free AI speaker as its first hardware product, positioning it to rival Apple amid an ongoing trade secret lawsuit
item.content:encoded: OpenAI is developing a movable, screen-free AI speaker as its first hardware product, positioning it to rival Apple amid an ongoing trade secret lawsuit

item.title: 'Death Row Can Be Revised': Bangladesh 'Welcomes' Sheikh Hasina's Return Plan

media:content.media:description: Hasina was sentenced to death in absentia in Bangladesh last year

item.description: Last week, sources close to Hasina said she was preparing to voluntarily return to Dhaka by the end of this year to revive her Awami League party.
item.content:encoded: Last week, sources close to Hasina said she was preparing to voluntarily return to Dhaka by the end of this year to revive her Awami League party.

item.title: Japan Faces Deep Royal Crisis As Rules Block Women From The Throne

media:content.media:description: Japanese Emperor Naruhito, clad in traditional white ceremonial robes, takes part in a royal ritual.

item.description: Japan has had eight reigning empresses throughout its history, but a law introduced in 1889 formally barred women from ascending the Chrysanthemum Throne.
item.content:encoded: Japan has had eight reigning empresses throughout its history, but a law introduced in 1889 formally barred women from ascending the Chrysanthemum Throne.

item.title: No Turning Back The Clock? US House Passes Daylight Saving Time Bill

media:content.media:description: Detractors said permanent daylight saving time would lead to darker winter mornings

item.description: Daylight saving time is that period between spring and fall when clocks in most parts of the United States are set one hour ahead of standard time.
item.content:encoded: Daylight saving time is that period between spring and fall when clocks in most parts of the United States are set one hour ahead of standard time.

item.title: Musk May Have Broken Wisconsin Election Law By Offering $1 Million To Voters

media:content.media:description: Musk was involved in the effort to flip majority control of highest court in battleground Wisconsin

item.description: A bipartisan Wisconsin panel found that Elon Musk may have violated state election laws by offering $1 million payments to voters during the 2025 Supreme Court race.
item.content:encoded: A bipartisan Wisconsin panel found that Elon Musk may have violated state election laws by offering $1 million payments to voters during the 2025 Supreme Court race.

item.title: 'Hormuz Control Is A Must': Iran Withdraws From US Deal Over New Blockade

media:content.media:description: The US first imposed the blockade in mid-April and then lifted it in mid-June

item.description: Days of retaliatory strikes across the Middle East by Iran — and both nations' attempts to vie for control of the waterway through which a fifth of the world's oil and natural gas passes during peacetime — threaten to push the region back to all-out war.
item.content:encoded: Days of retaliatory strikes across the Middle East by Iran — and both nations' attempts to vie for control of the waterway through which a fifth of the world's oil and natural gas passes during peacetime — threaten to push the region back to all-out war.

item.title: Chinese Investor Spends Rs 18 Crore In 9-Year Hunt For Ex-Wife Who Scammed Him And Fled To US

media:content.media:description: Determined to find her, Li offered a US$1 million reward for information about Zhang's whereabouts.

item.description: According to Li, she left with the money, ownership documents for four properties he had purchased, and all her identification documents.
item.content:encoded: According to Li, she left with the money, ownership documents for four properties he had purchased, and all her identification documents.

item.title: What Is Pickaxe Mountain And Why Donald Trump Wants To "Take It Out"

media:content.media:description: Trump claimed the US was keeping a close watch on developments at the site

item.description: Pickaxe Mountain is located near Iran's heavily damaged Natanz uranium enrichment facility and is regarded as one of the country's most heavily fortified nuclear-related sites.
item.content:encoded: Pickaxe Mountain is located near Iran's heavily damaged Natanz uranium enrichment facility and is regarded as one of the country's most heavily fortified nuclear-related sites.

item.title: "Tremendous Chemistry": Trump Welcomes New Iraqi PM During White House Visit

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump gave Iraq's new prime minister an effusive welcome at the White House on Tuesday.

item.description: President Donald Trump gave Iraq's new prime minister an effusive welcome at the White House on Tuesday, promoting the "tremendous chemistry" between him and a fellow wealthy businessman.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump gave Iraq's new prime minister an effusive welcome at the White House on Tuesday, promoting the "tremendous chemistry" between him and a fellow wealthy businessman.
